name: MISTRAS Group, Inc.
description: MISTRAS Group, Inc. is a leading multinational provider of integrated, technology-enabled asset integrity solutions. The company specializes in helping clients maximize the safety and operational uptime of critical industrial and civil assets across sectors such as oil and gas, aerospace, defense, power, and manufacturing. MISTRAS offers a comprehensive suite of services, including non-destructive testing (NDT) equipment, field inspection, laboratory testing, data management, and predictive maintenance consulting. Headquartered in Princeton Junction, New Jersey, the company leverages its proprietary technology and multi-disciplinary expertise to provide end-to-end asset protection and risk management strategies globally.
